CustomField.defaultValue: IF( OR( ISPICKVAL($User.Div__c, "TDX"), ISPICKVAL($User.Div__c, "CDD/IDD"), ISPICKVAL($User.Div__c, "CDD/IDD/MBD"), ISPICKVAL($User.Div__c, "CDD/IDD/MBD/TDX"), ISPICKVAL($User.Div__c, "CDD/IDD/TDX"), ISPICKVAL($User.Div__c, "IDD"), ISPICKVAL($User.Div__c, "IDD/MBD"), ISPICKVAL($User.Div__c, "IDD/MBD/TDX"), ISPICKVAL($User.Div__c, "IDD/TDX") ), 12, NULL )
CustomField.description: [CDD NA Pilot] Length of the contract by month.
CustomField.label: Contract Length (months)
